Inflatable Rentals for School Events and Fun Days in Nova Scotia

School fun days and field days need equipment that can handle large groups, repeated use, and mixed age ranges. Nova Kingdom Rentals provides commercial-grade inflatable rentals built for school events, with full setup and takedown handled by our team. We are based in Bridgewater and serve schools across the South Shore and Nova Scotia.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, NS and serves schools and educational institutions across Nova Scotia.

Best For

  • Elementary and middle school fun days
  • End-of-year outdoor school events
  • PTA and school fundraiser events
  • Multi-grade field days with mixed age groups

Frequently Asked Questions

Are your inflatables safe for school events?
Yes. All Nova Kingdom Rentals equipment is commercial-grade and fully insured. We provide a certificate of insurance upon request for school boards and event coordinators. Adult supervision is required at all times, and we brief the responsible staff on safe use before leaving the setup.
Which inflatables work best for school fun days?
For school fun days, we recommend the Crown Quest obstacle course ($289), Crown Axe Challenge ($180), and Crown Kick Darts ($160) for broader age groups. Crown Climber ($280) is a good add-on for younger kids' groups. Combo packages offer bundled savings — submit your student count and we can recommend the right mix.
Can you provide multiple inflatables for a large school event?
Yes. For larger school events, we recommend booking multiple units or a package. Our packages bundle inflatables and games with built-in savings from $370. Submit your event details and number of students and we will recommend the right combination.
Do you provide a certificate of insurance for school bookings?
Yes. Nova Kingdom Rentals carries commercial liability insurance and can provide a certificate of insurance upon request. Contact us at booknovakingdom@gmail.com or 902-990-0005 to request documentation for your school board or event coordinator.
